title: Why can't Monday.com nest sub-items like Microsoft Project ? Only one level of sub-items allowed?
excerpt: Why can’t Monday.com nest sub-items like Microsoft Project ?  Only one level of sub-items allowed ?

posts.author: APLUSMikeG (Michael Green)
posts.cookedHtml: Why can’t Monday.com nest sub-items like Microsoft Project ? Only one level of sub-items allowed ?

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Michael,

Welcome to the community!

Would using the checklist feature inside the updates section of the sub-items be an option for you?

Cheers,
Harsh

We develop custom solutions on Monday to help elevate your business. Reach out on farioconsulting.com

posts.author: jhanold (Julia Hanold | OrangeDot | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Michael,

As you noted, there is only one level of sub-items currently available in monday.com. One way to create another set of tasks is to use the checklist function within the update section. By using this feature, you can create another set of tasks that can be ‘checked off’ by users. You can also see the progress of the list directly on the subitem itself. It is not as detailed as an actual subitem, but thought I’d share if it helps.

image1651×687 94.3 KB

image1651×687 99.6 KB

Happy Building!

Julia Hanold
Managing Director, OrangeDot - monday.com Platinum Partner
